channel.name: Amida Care

connector.name: Original File Writer, Put data in global map

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "$('fileRejected')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('processedCount')" does not equal 0

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Generate Error Content

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "$('errorCount')" does not equal 0
Accept message if "$('fileRejected')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('fileRejected')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('fileRejected')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('isLambdaRejection')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('fileRejected')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('isLambdaRejection')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('d7') && $('d7').getStatus() " does not equal Status.ERROR

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.script: var currentTime = new Date().toISOString().replace("T"," ").substring(0, 19); channelMap.put("currentTimeStamp", currentTime);

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "$('fileRejected')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('totalErrors')" does not equal 0
Accept message if "$('fileRejected')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('fileRejected')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('isLambdaRejection')" does not equal true
Accept message if "$('d7') && $('d7').getStatus()" does not equal Status.ERROR
Accept message if "$('d7') && $('d7').getStatus()" is not blank

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
